topraktan.name: From the soil
topraktan.description: Dishes prepared with seasonal vegetables and herbs straight from the ground.

denizden.name: From the sea
denizden.description: Dishes prepared with seafood from the Aegean and Mediterranean Seas.

otlaktan.name: From the meadow
otlaktan.description: Main courses featuring meat and offal, carefully prepared.

urla-enginar-confit.name: Urla Artichoke Confit
urla-enginar-confit.description: Fresh greens, lacto-fermented fruit, and Memecik olive oil.

tuzlu-kavun.name: Salty Melon
tuzlu-kavun.description: Antakya salted yogurt, melon slices, white chickpeas, and Memecik olive oil.

uc-mantarli-taze-cavatelli.name: Fresh Cavatelli with Three Types of Mushrooms
uc-mantarli-taze-cavatelli.description: Porcini, chanterelle, oyster mushrooms, and aged Mihaliç sheep’s milk cheese.

kereviz-sinitzel.name: Celery Schnitzel
kereviz-sinitzel.description: Sliced celery, hibesh, and spoon salad.

ci-salatasi.name: “Çi” Salad
ci-salatasi.description: Arugula, wild purslane, Yedikule lettuce, seasonal fruit, Çorum Kargı tulum cheese, roasted walnuts, and cucumber vinaigrette.

karisik-kabuklu-kasesi.name: Assorted Nuts and Seeds Bowl
karisik-kabuklu-kasesi.description: Clams, cockles, black mussels, razor clams, and scallops; served with tomato or wine sauce.

ci-karides.name: “Çi” Shrimp
ci-karides.description: Afyon sourdough bread and butter with bottarga.

izgara-baby-kalamar.name: Grilled Baby Squid
izgara-baby-kalamar.description: Tomato paste and aged Mihaliç cheese.

aslan-baligi.name: Lionfish
aslan-baligi.description: Beurre blanc sauce with basil and green apples.

izgara-granyoz.name: Grilled Granyöz
izgara-granyoz.description: Buckwheat salad with cucumber and caper sauce with brown butter.

deniz-mahsullu-makarna.name: Pasta with Seafood
deniz-mahsullu-makarna.description: San Marzano tomato sauce, shrimp, squid, mussels, vongole, and Divle Obruk cheese.

sakatat-pate.name: Offal Pâté
sakatat-pate.description: Lamb sweetbreads, lamb brain, chicken liver, and chicken heart.

arnavut-cigeri.name: Albanian Liver
arnavut-cigeri.description: Onion salad and hand-rolled crispy phyllo bread.

izgara-kuzu-kokorec.name: Grilled Lamb Kokoreç
izgara-kuzu-kokorec.description: Denizli bell peppers, Antakya salted yogurt, and pickled cucumber salad.

izgara-dana-kontrfile-dilimleri.name: Grilled Beef Tenderloin Slices
izgara-dana-kontrfile-dilimleri.description: Zucchini polenta with caramelized onion sauce.

notes.serviceNote: Items marked with an asterisk (*) are main course portions. A 10% service charge will be added to the bill.
notes.wineNotice: Please consult our team regarding our wine selection, which consists largely of wines from local producers.
